java.lang.constant/MethodTypeDesc/change.name: changeParameterType
signatures: public MethodTypeDesc changeParameterType(int index, ClassDesc paramType)
java.lang.constant/MethodTypeDesc/change.description:
Returns aMethodTypeDescthat is identical to this one,
except that a single parameter type has been changed to the specified type.

info.excerpt:

java.lang.constant/MethodTypeDesc/change.name: changeReturnType
